# Codebase Structure
```
/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/
src/
    ActionInitialization.cc
    RunAction.cc
    SteppingAction.cc
    PrimaryGeneratorAction.cc
    DetectorConstruction.cc
    EventAction.cc
    .ipynb_checkpoints/
        DetectorConstruction-checkpoint.cc
        ActionInitialization-checkpoint.cc
        PrimaryGeneratorAction-checkpoint.cc
        EventAction-checkpoint.cc
        SteppingAction-checkpoint.cc
        RunAction-checkpoint.cc
/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/
include/
    RunAction.hh
    DetectorConstruction.hh
    EventAction.hh
    PrimaryGeneratorAction.hh
    SteppingAction.hh
    ActionInitialization.hh
    .ipynb_checkpoints/
        DetectorConstruction-checkpoint.hh
        SteppingAction-checkpoint.hh
        ActionInitialization-checkpoint.hh
        PrimaryGeneratorAction-checkpoint.hh
        RunAction-checkpoint.hh
        EventAction-checkpoint.hh
```
==================================================
<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/ActionInitialization.cc">
#include "ActionInitialization.hh"
#include "PrimaryGeneratorAction.hh"
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "EventAction.hh"
#include "SteppingAction.hh"

ActionInitialization::ActionInitialization() : G4VUserActionInitialization() {}
ActionInitialization::~ActionInitialization() {}

void ActionInitialization::BuildForMaster() const {
    SetUserAction(new RunAction);
}

void ActionInitialization::Build() const {
    RunAction* runAction = new RunAction;
    SetUserAction(runAction);
    SetUserAction(new EventAction(runAction)); // Register EventAction
    SetUserAction(new PrimaryGeneratorAction);
    SetUserAction(new SteppingAction(runAction));
}

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/RunAction.cc">
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "G4AnalysisManager.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"

RunAction::RunAction() : G4UserRunAction() {
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->SetNtupleMerging(true);

    // H1 ID 0: Total energy deposition per event
    analysisManager->CreateH1("PixelEdep", "Energy Deposition per Event", 3120, 0., 3.12*MeV);

    // H2 ID 0: 2D Map of energy deposition
    analysisManager->CreateH2("EdepHeatMap", "Spatial Edep",
                         352, -176*100*um, 176*100*um,
                         384, -192*100*um, 192*100*um);

    // H2 ID 1: 2D Map of electron surface hits (ground truth labels)
    analysisManager->CreateH2("HitsHeatMap", "Electron Surface Hits",
                         352, -176*100*um, 176*100*um,
                         384, -192*100*um, 192*100*um);
}

RunAction::~RunAction() {}

void RunAction::BeginOfRunAction(const G4Run*) {
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->SetDefaultFileType("root");   
    analysisManager->OpenFile();  
}

void RunAction::EndOfRunAction(const G4Run*) {
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->Write();
    analysisManager->CloseFile();
}
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/SteppingAction.cc">
#include "SteppingAction.hh"
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "G4Step.hh"
#include "G4Track.hh"
#include "G4RunManager.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"

void SteppingAction::UserSteppingAction(const G4Step* step) {
    auto volume = step->GetPreStepPoint()->GetTouchableHandle()->GetVolume();
    if (!volume) return;
    if (volume->GetName() != "Module") return;

    //========================================
    G4double stepSize = step->GetStepLength(); 
    
    // Convert to mm for readable output
    G4cout << "Step size: " << stepSize / mm << " mm" << G4endl; 
    //========================================
    
    G4int trackId = step->GetTrack()->GetTrackID();

    // --- 1. Energy deposition (H2 ID 0) ---
    G4double edep = step->GetTotalEnergyDeposit();
    if (edep > 0.) {
        G4ThreeVector pre  = step->GetPreStepPoint()->GetPosition();
        G4ThreeVector post = step->GetPostStepPoint()->GetPosition();
        G4ThreeVector pos  = 0.5 * (pre + post);
        fRunAction->AddHit(pos.x(), pos.y(), edep, trackId);
    }

    // --- 2. Surface hit (H2 ID 1) — primary electrons only ---
    // Only count the PRIMARY particle (the electron you shot)
    if (step->GetTrack()->GetParentID() == 0) {
        // Pre-step point of the FIRST step in this volume = surface position
        // AddSurfaceHit internally ignores duplicate trackIds
        G4ThreeVector surfPos = step->GetPreStepPoint()->GetPosition();
        fRunAction->AddSurfaceHit(surfPos.x(), surfPos.y(), trackId);
    }

    if (trackId == 1 && track->GetDefinition()
}
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/PrimaryGeneratorAction.cc">
#include "PrimaryGeneratorAction.hh"
#include "G4ParticleGun.hh"
#include "G4ParticleTable.hh"
#include "G4ParticleDefinition.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"
#include "Randomize.hh"
#include <cmath>

// Check carefully: Does this exact line exist?
PrimaryGeneratorAction::PrimaryGeneratorAction() 
: G4VUserPrimaryGeneratorAction(), fParticleGun(nullptr) 
{
    G4int n_particle = 1;
    fParticleGun = new G4ParticleGun(n_particle);

    // Default particle kinematics
    auto particleTable = G4ParticleTable::GetParticleTable();
    auto particle = particleTable->FindParticle("e-");
    fParticleGun->SetParticleDefinition(particle);
    fParticleGun->SetParticleEnergy(3.12*MeV);
}

PrimaryGeneratorAction::~PrimaryGeneratorAction() {
    delete fParticleGun;
}

void PrimaryGeneratorAction::GeneratePrimaries(G4Event* anEvent) {
    G4double z = -20*um;

    G4double xpos = CLHEP::RandFlat::shoot(-17.6, 17.6) *mm;
    G4double ypos = CLHEP::RandFlat::shoot(-19.2, 19.2) *mm;
    
    fParticleGun->SetParticlePosition(G4ThreeVector(xpos,ypos,z));
    fParticleGun->SetParticleMomentumDirection(G4ThreeVector(0.,0.,1.));
    
    //fParticleGun->SetParticlePosition(G4ThreeVector(x0, y0, z0));
    fParticleGun->GeneratePrimaryVertex(anEvent);
}

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/DetectorConstruction.cc">
#include "DetectorConstruction.hh"

#include "G4RunManager.hh"
#include "G4NistManager.hh"
#include "G4Box.hh"
#include "G4LogicalVolume.hh"
#include "G4PVPlacement.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"
#include "G4UserLimits.hh"

DetectorConstruction::DetectorConstruction() : G4VUserDetectorConstruction() {}
DetectorConstruction::~DetectorConstruction() {}

G4VPhysicalVolume* DetectorConstruction::Construct() {
    G4NistManager* nist = G4NistManager::Instance();
    
    // Materials
    G4Material* world_mat = nist->FindOrBuildMaterial("G4_Galactic");
    G4Material* pixel_mat = nist->FindOrBuildMaterial("G4_Si");

    // World Volume
    G4double world_size = 25*cm;
    G4Box* solidWorld = new G4Box("World", world_size, world_size, world_size);
    G4LogicalVolume* logicWorld = new G4LogicalVolume(solidWorld, world_mat, "World");
    G4VPhysicalVolume* physWorld = new G4PVPlacement(0, G4ThreeVector(), logicWorld, "World", 0, false, 0);

    // Each module's Volume (352*100*um x 384*100*um x 500um -> Half lengths: 50x50x250)
    G4Box* solidPixel = new G4Box("Pixel", 50*um, 50*um, 225*um);
    G4LogicalVolume* logicPixel = new G4LogicalVolume(solidPixel, pixel_mat, "Pixel");

    //========================================
    G4Region* pixelRegion = new G4Region("PixelRegion");
    logicPixel->SetRegion(pixelRegion);
    G4UserLimits* pixelStepLimit = new G4UserLimits(16 * um);
    pixelRegion->SetUserLimits(pixelStepLimit);
    //========================================
    // 2D Array Loop (4x4)
    
    for (G4int i = -176; i < 176; i++) {
        for (G4int j = -192; j < 192; j++) {
            G4double xPos = (i + 0.5) * 100.0*um;
            G4double yPos = (j + 0.5) * 100.0*um;
            new G4PVPlacement(0, G4ThreeVector(xPos, yPos, 0), logicPixel, "Module", logicWorld, false, i*176 + j);
        }
    }

    return physWorld;
}

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/EventAction.cc">
#include "EventAction.hh"
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "G4AnalysisManager.hh"
#include "G4Event.hh"
#include <iostream>
#include <fstream>

EventAction::EventAction(RunAction* runAction) : G4UserEventAction(), fRunAction(runAction), fTotalEdep(0.) {}
EventAction::~EventAction() {}

void EventAction::BeginOfEventAction(const G4Event*) {
    fRunAction->ResetEdep();
    fTotalEdep=0;
}

void EventAction::EndOfEventAction(const G4Event*) {
    G4int eventID = event->GetEventID();
    
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    G4double totalEdep = 0.;

    // Fill EdepHeatMap (H2 ID 0)
    for (const auto& h : fRunAction->GetHits()) {
        analysisManager->FillH2(0, h.x, h.y, h.edep);
        totalEdep += h.edep;
    }

    if (totalEdep > 0.) {
        analysisManager->FillH1(0, totalEdep);
    }

    // Fill HitsHeatMap (H2 ID 1) — one entry per primary electron
    for (const auto& sh : fRunAction->GetSurfaceHits()) {
        analysisManager->FillH2(1, sh.x, sh.y, 1.0);
    }
    //============================================================
    G4int eventID = event->GetEventID();

    // Write per-pixel deposits to CSV (or use ROOT ntuples)
    static std::ofstream outFile("pixel_deposits.csv", std::ios::app);
    static bool headerWritten = false;
    if (!headerWritten) {
        outFile << "eventID,pixX,pixY,edep_MeV\n";
        headerWritten = true;
    }

    for (const auto& [pixel, edep] : fPixelEdepMap) {
        outFile << eventID << ","
                << pixel.first << ","
                << pixel.second << ","
                << edep << "\n";  // edep already in MeV
    }

    // Also store total per-electron energy for validation
    fTotalEdep = 0.;
    for (const auto& [pixel, edep] : fPixelEdepMap) {
        fTotalEdep += edep;
    }

    // Optional: fill a histogram with total energy per electron
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->FillH1(0, fTotalEdep);  // Should give Landau ~0.13 MeV
    //============================================================
    
}
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/.ipynb_checkpoints/DetectorConstruction-checkpoint.cc">
#include "DetectorConstruction.hh"

#include "G4RunManager.hh"
#include "G4NistManager.hh"
#include "G4Box.hh"
#include "G4LogicalVolume.hh"
#include "G4PVPlacement.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"
#include "G4UserLimits.hh"

DetectorConstruction::DetectorConstruction() : G4VUserDetectorConstruction() {}
DetectorConstruction::~DetectorConstruction() {}

G4VPhysicalVolume* DetectorConstruction::Construct() {
    G4NistManager* nist = G4NistManager::Instance();
    
    // Materials
    G4Material* world_mat = nist->FindOrBuildMaterial("G4_Galactic");
    G4Material* pixel_mat = nist->FindOrBuildMaterial("G4_Si");

    // World Volume
    G4double world_size = 25*cm;
    G4Box* solidWorld = new G4Box("World", world_size, world_size, world_size);
    G4LogicalVolume* logicWorld = new G4LogicalVolume(solidWorld, world_mat, "World");
    G4VPhysicalVolume* physWorld = new G4PVPlacement(0, G4ThreeVector(), logicWorld, "World", 0, false, 0);

    // Each module's Volume (352*100*um x 384*100*um x 500um -> Half lengths: 50x50x250)
    G4Box* solidPixel = new G4Box("Pixel", 50*um, 50*um, 225*um);
    G4LogicalVolume* logicPixel = new G4LogicalVolume(solidPixel, pixel_mat, "Pixel");

    //========================================
    G4Region* pixelRegion = new G4Region("PixelRegion");
    logicPixel->SetRegion(pixelRegion);
    G4UserLimits* pixelStepLimit = new G4UserLimits(16 * um);
    pixelRegion->SetUserLimits(pixelStepLimit);
    //========================================
    // 2D Array Loop (4x4)
    
    for (G4int i = -176; i < 176; i++) {
        for (G4int j = -192; j < 192; j++) {
            G4double xPos = (i + 0.5) * 100.0*um;
            G4double yPos = (j + 0.5) * 100.0*um;
            new G4PVPlacement(0, G4ThreeVector(xPos, yPos, 0), logicPixel, "Module", logicWorld, false, i*176 + j);
        }
    }

    return physWorld;
}

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/.ipynb_checkpoints/ActionInitialization-checkpoint.cc">
#include "ActionInitialization.hh"
#include "PrimaryGeneratorAction.hh"
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "EventAction.hh"
#include "SteppingAction.hh"

ActionInitialization::ActionInitialization() : G4VUserActionInitialization() {}
ActionInitialization::~ActionInitialization() {}

void ActionInitialization::BuildForMaster() const {
    SetUserAction(new RunAction);
}

void ActionInitialization::Build() const {
    RunAction* runAction = new RunAction;
    SetUserAction(runAction);
    SetUserAction(new EventAction(runAction)); // Register EventAction
    SetUserAction(new PrimaryGeneratorAction);
    SetUserAction(new SteppingAction(runAction));
}

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/.ipynb_checkpoints/PrimaryGeneratorAction-checkpoint.cc">
#include "PrimaryGeneratorAction.hh"
#include "G4ParticleGun.hh"
#include "G4ParticleTable.hh"
#include "G4ParticleDefinition.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"
#include "Randomize.hh"
#include <cmath>

// Check carefully: Does this exact line exist?
PrimaryGeneratorAction::PrimaryGeneratorAction() 
: G4VUserPrimaryGeneratorAction(), fParticleGun(nullptr) 
{
    G4int n_particle = 1;
    fParticleGun = new G4ParticleGun(n_particle);

    // Default particle kinematics
    auto particleTable = G4ParticleTable::GetParticleTable();
    auto particle = particleTable->FindParticle("e-");
    fParticleGun->SetParticleDefinition(particle);
    fParticleGun->SetParticleEnergy(3.12*MeV);
}

PrimaryGeneratorAction::~PrimaryGeneratorAction() {
    delete fParticleGun;
}

void PrimaryGeneratorAction::GeneratePrimaries(G4Event* anEvent) {
    G4double z = -20*um;

    G4double xpos = CLHEP::RandFlat::shoot(-17.6, 17.6) *mm;
    G4double ypos = CLHEP::RandFlat::shoot(-19.2, 19.2) *mm;
    
    fParticleGun->SetParticlePosition(G4ThreeVector(xpos,ypos,z));
    fParticleGun->SetParticleMomentumDirection(G4ThreeVector(0.,0.,1.));
    
    //fParticleGun->SetParticlePosition(G4ThreeVector(x0, y0, z0));
    fParticleGun->GeneratePrimaryVertex(anEvent);
}

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/.ipynb_checkpoints/EventAction-checkpoint.cc">
#include "EventAction.hh"
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "G4AnalysisManager.hh"
#include "G4Event.hh"
#include <iostream>
#include <fstream>

EventAction::EventAction(RunAction* runAction) : G4UserEventAction(), fRunAction(runAction), fTotalEdep(0.) {}
EventAction::~EventAction() {}

void EventAction::BeginOfEventAction(const G4Event*) {
    fRunAction->ResetEdep();
    fTotalEdep=0;
}

void EventAction::EndOfEventAction(const G4Event*) {
    G4int eventID = event->GetEventID();
    
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    G4double totalEdep = 0.;

    // Fill EdepHeatMap (H2 ID 0)
    for (const auto& h : fRunAction->GetHits()) {
        analysisManager->FillH2(0, h.x, h.y, h.edep);
        totalEdep += h.edep;
    }

    if (totalEdep > 0.) {
        analysisManager->FillH1(0, totalEdep);
    }

    // Fill HitsHeatMap (H2 ID 1) — one entry per primary electron
    for (const auto& sh : fRunAction->GetSurfaceHits()) {
        analysisManager->FillH2(1, sh.x, sh.y, 1.0);
    }
    //============================================================
    G4int eventID = event->GetEventID();

    // Write per-pixel deposits to CSV (or use ROOT ntuples)
    static std::ofstream outFile("pixel_deposits.csv", std::ios::app);
    static bool headerWritten = false;
    if (!headerWritten) {
        outFile << "eventID,pixX,pixY,edep_MeV\n";
        headerWritten = true;
    }

    for (const auto& [pixel, edep] : fPixelEdepMap) {
        outFile << eventID << ","
                << pixel.first << ","
                << pixel.second << ","
                << edep << "\n";  // edep already in MeV
    }

    // Also store total per-electron energy for validation
    fTotalEdep = 0.;
    for (const auto& [pixel, edep] : fPixelEdepMap) {
        fTotalEdep += edep;
    }

    // Optional: fill a histogram with total energy per electron
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->FillH1(0, fTotalEdep);  // Should give Landau ~0.13 MeV
    //============================================================
    
}
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/.ipynb_checkpoints/SteppingAction-checkpoint.cc">
#include "SteppingAction.hh"
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "G4Step.hh"
#include "G4Track.hh"
#include "G4RunManager.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"

void SteppingAction::UserSteppingAction(const G4Step* step) {
    auto volume = step->GetPreStepPoint()->GetTouchableHandle()->GetVolume();
    if (!volume) return;
    if (volume->GetName() != "Module") return;

    //========================================
    G4double stepSize = step->GetStepLength(); 
    
    // Convert to mm for readable output
    G4cout << "Step size: " << stepSize / mm << " mm" << G4endl; 
    //========================================
    
    G4int trackId = step->GetTrack()->GetTrackID();

    // --- 1. Energy deposition (H2 ID 0) ---
    G4double edep = step->GetTotalEnergyDeposit();
    if (edep > 0.) {
        G4ThreeVector pre  = step->GetPreStepPoint()->GetPosition();
        G4ThreeVector post = step->GetPostStepPoint()->GetPosition();
        G4ThreeVector pos  = 0.5 * (pre + post);
        fRunAction->AddHit(pos.x(), pos.y(), edep, trackId);
    }

    // --- 2. Surface hit (H2 ID 1) — primary electrons only ---
    // Only count the PRIMARY particle (the electron you shot)
    if (step->GetTrack()->GetParentID() == 0) {
        // Pre-step point of the FIRST step in this volume = surface position
        // AddSurfaceHit internally ignores duplicate trackIds
        G4ThreeVector surfPos = step->GetPreStepPoint()->GetPosition();
        fRunAction->AddSurfaceHit(surfPos.x(), surfPos.y(), trackId);
    }
}
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/src/.ipynb_checkpoints/RunAction-checkpoint.cc">
#include "RunAction.hh"
#include "G4AnalysisManager.hh"
#include "G4SystemOfUnits.hh"

RunAction::RunAction() : G4UserRunAction() {
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->SetNtupleMerging(true);

    // H1 ID 0: Total energy deposition per event
    analysisManager->CreateH1("PixelEdep", "Energy Deposition per Event", 3120, 0., 3.12*MeV);

    // H2 ID 0: 2D Map of energy deposition
    analysisManager->CreateH2("EdepHeatMap", "Spatial Edep",
                         352, -176*100*um, 176*100*um,
                         384, -192*100*um, 192*100*um);

    // H2 ID 1: 2D Map of electron surface hits (ground truth labels)
    analysisManager->CreateH2("HitsHeatMap", "Electron Surface Hits",
                         352, -176*100*um, 176*100*um,
                         384, -192*100*um, 192*100*um);
}

RunAction::~RunAction() {}

void RunAction::BeginOfRunAction(const G4Run*) {
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->SetDefaultFileType("root");   
    analysisManager->OpenFile();  
}

void RunAction::EndOfRunAction(const G4Run*) {
    auto analysisManager = G4AnalysisManager::Instance();
    analysisManager->Write();
    analysisManager->CloseFile();
}
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/RunAction.hh">
#ifndef RunAction_h
#define RunAction_h 1
#include "G4UserRunAction.hh"
#include "globals.hh"
#include <vector>
#include <set>

class RunAction : public G4UserRunAction {
  public:
    struct Hit { G4double x; G4double y; G4double edep; G4int trackId; };
    struct SurfaceHit { G4double x; G4double y; G4int trackId; };

    RunAction();
    virtual ~RunAction();
    virtual void BeginOfRunAction(const G4Run*);
    virtual void EndOfRunAction(const G4Run*);

    void AddHit(G4double x, G4double y, G4double edep, G4int trackId) {
        fHits.push_back({x, y, edep, trackId});
    }
    const std::vector<Hit>& GetHits() const { return fHits; }

    // Only records the FIRST call per trackId (i.e., the surface entry point)
    void AddSurfaceHit(G4double x, G4double y, G4int trackId) {
        if (fRecordedTracks.find(trackId) == fRecordedTracks.end()) {
            fSurfaceHits.push_back({x, y, trackId});
            fRecordedTracks.insert(trackId);
        }
    }
    const std::vector<SurfaceHit>& GetSurfaceHits() const { return fSurfaceHits; }

    void ResetEdep() {
        fHits.clear();
        fSurfaceHits.clear();
        fRecordedTracks.clear();
    }

  private:
    std::vector<Hit> fHits;
    std::vector<SurfaceHit> fSurfaceHits;
    std::set<G4int> fRecordedTracks;  // tracks already recorded this event
};
#endif
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/DetectorConstruction.hh">
#ifndef DetectorConstruction_h
#define DetectorConstruction_h 1

#include "G4VUserDetectorConstruction.hh"
#include "globals.hh"

class G4VPhysicalVolume;
class G4LogicalVolume;

class DetectorConstruction : public G4VUserDetectorConstruction {
  public:
    DetectorConstruction();
    virtual ~DetectorConstruction();
    virtual G4VPhysicalVolume* Construct();
};

#endif

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/EventAction.hh">
#ifndef EventAction_h
#define EventAction_h 1

#include "G4UserEventAction.hh"
#include "globals.hh"
#include <map>
#include <vector>
#include <utility>

class RunAction;

class EventAction : public G4UserEventAction {
  public:
    EventAction(RunAction* runAction);
    virtual ~EventAction();

    virtual void BeginOfEventAction(const G4Event*);
    virtual void EndOfEventAction(const G4Event*);

    //========================================================
    // Called by SteppingAction to accumulate deposits
    void AddPixelEdep(G4int pixX, G4int pixY, G4double edep);

    // Accessors for output
    const std::map<std::pair<int,int>, double>& GetPixelMap() const { return fPixelEdepMap; }
    double GetTotalEdep() const { return fTotalEdep; }
    //========================================================
  private:
    RunAction* fRunAction;

    //========================================================
    std::map<std::pair<int,int>, double> fPixelEdepMap;
    double fTotalEdep;
    //========================================================
};

#endif

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/PrimaryGeneratorAction.hh">
#ifndef PrimaryGeneratorAction_h
#define PrimaryGeneratorAction_h 1

#include "G4VUserPrimaryGeneratorAction.hh"
#include "G4ParticleGun.hh"
#include "globals.hh"

class G4Event;

class PrimaryGeneratorAction : public G4VUserPrimaryGeneratorAction {
  public:
    PrimaryGeneratorAction();    
    virtual ~PrimaryGeneratorAction();
    virtual void GeneratePrimaries(G4Event*);         
  
  private:
    G4ParticleGun* fParticleGun; 
};

#endif

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/SteppingAction.hh">
#ifndef SteppingAction_h
#define SteppingAction_h 1
#include "G4UserSteppingAction.hh"

class RunAction;

class SteppingAction : public G4UserSteppingAction {
  public:
    SteppingAction(RunAction* runAction) : G4UserSteppingAction(), fRunAction(runAction) {}
    virtual ~SteppingAction() {}
    virtual void UserSteppingAction(const G4Step*);
  private:
    RunAction* fRunAction;
};
#endif
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/ActionInitialization.hh">
#ifndef ActionInitialization_h
#define ActionInitialization_h 1

#include "G4VUserActionInitialization.hh"

class ActionInitialization : public G4VUserActionInitialization {
  public:
    ActionInitialization();
    virtual ~ActionInitialization();

    virtual void BuildForMaster() const;
    virtual void Build() const;
};

#endif

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/.ipynb_checkpoints/DetectorConstruction-checkpoint.hh">

#define DetectorConstruction_h 1

class G4VPhysicalVolume;
class G4LogicalVolume;

class DetectorConstruction : public G4VUserDetectorConstruction {
  public:
    DetectorConstruction();
    virtual ~DetectorConstruction();
    virtual G4VPhysicalVolume* Construct();
};

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/.ipynb_checkpoints/SteppingAction-checkpoint.hh">
#ifndef SteppingAction_h
#define SteppingAction_h 1
#include "G4UserSteppingAction.hh"

class RunAction;

class SteppingAction : public G4UserSteppingAction {
  public:
    SteppingAction(RunAction* runAction) : G4UserSteppingAction(), fRunAction(runAction) {}
    virtual ~SteppingAction() {}
    virtual void UserSteppingAction(const G4Step*);
  private:
    RunAction* fRunAction;
};
#endif
</file>

    ActionInitialization();
    virtual ~ActionInitialization();

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/.ipynb_checkpoints/PrimaryGeneratorAction-checkpoint.hh">
#ifndef PrimaryGeneratorAction_h
#define PrimaryGeneratorAction_h 1

#include "G4VUserPrimaryGeneratorAction.hh"
#include "G4ParticleGun.hh"
#include "globals.hh"

class G4Event;

class PrimaryGeneratorAction : public G4VUserPrimaryGeneratorAction {
  public:
    PrimaryGeneratorAction();    
    virtual ~PrimaryGeneratorAction();
    virtual void GeneratePrimaries(G4Event*);         
  
  private:
    G4ParticleGun* fParticleGun; 
};

#endif

</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/.ipynb_checkpoints/RunAction-checkpoint.hh">
#ifndef RunAction_h
#define RunAction_h 1
#include "G4UserRunAction.hh"
#include "globals.hh"
#include <vector>
#include <set>

class RunAction : public G4UserRunAction {
  public:
    struct Hit { G4double x; G4double y; G4double edep; G4int trackId; };
    struct SurfaceHit { G4double x; G4double y; G4int trackId; };

    RunAction();
    virtual ~RunAction();
    virtual void BeginOfRunAction(const G4Run*);
    virtual void EndOfRunAction(const G4Run*);

    void AddHit(G4double x, G4double y, G4double edep, G4int trackId) {
        fHits.push_back({x, y, edep, trackId});
    }
    const std::vector<Hit>& GetHits() const { return fHits; }

    // Only records the FIRST call per trackId (i.e., the surface entry point)
    void AddSurfaceHit(G4double x, G4double y, G4int trackId) {
        if (fRecordedTracks.find(trackId) == fRecordedTracks.end()) {
            fSurfaceHits.push_back({x, y, trackId});
            fRecordedTracks.insert(trackId);
        }
    }
    const std::vector<SurfaceHit>& GetSurfaceHits() const { return fSurfaceHits; }

    void ResetEdep() {
        fHits.clear();
        fSurfaceHits.clear();
        fRecordedTracks.clear();
    }

  private:
    std::vector<Hit> fHits;
    std::vector<SurfaceHit> fSurfaceHits;
    std::set<G4int> fRecordedTracks;  // tracks already recorded this event
};
#endif
</file>

<file path="/sdf/home/d/dhruvshr/ePix_Simulation/Examples/PixelSim_ePix/include/.ipynb_checkpoints/EventAction-checkpoint.hh">
#ifndef EventAction_h
#define EventAction_h 1

#include "G4UserEventAction.hh"
#include "globals.hh"
#include <map>
#include <vector>
#include <utility>

class RunAction;

class EventAction : public G4UserEventAction {
  public:
    EventAction(RunAction* runAction);
    virtual ~EventAction();

    virtual void BeginOfEventAction(const G4Event*);
    virtual void EndOfEventAction(const G4Event*);

    //========================================================
    // Called by SteppingAction to accumulate deposits
    void AddPixelEdep(G4int pixX, G4int pixY, G4double edep);

    // Accessors for output
    const std::map<std::pair<int,int>, double>& GetPixelMap() const { return fPixelEdepMap; }
    double GetTotalEdep() const { return fTotalEdep; }
    //========================================================
  private:
    RunAction* fRunAction;

    //========================================================
    std::map<std::pair<int,int>, double> fPixelEdepMap;
    double fTotalEdep;
    //========================================================
};

#endif

</file>
